name: JUST FOR PLEASURE
description:
Thanks to your uncle fleeing the country, you have inherited his house. You could sell it or remodel it to live in that place as if you were someone from the upper class. But upon entering one of the rooms, you realize that your uncle had more things hidden than just his bank account.

AnyPOV

TW: Sexual slavery, brainwashing, kidnapping, among other topics

This bot was tested and edited with Claude and Deepseek V3. With the help of karmapolar.

English is not my main language. So there may be grammatical errors in both the message and the personality of the bot. Please let me know, and I will edit it in my spare time.

uncensored
creator: pamela18
